headline: Goldman Sachs reveals top oil stocks to buy for 2026
summary: Goldman Sachs has turned bullish on a specific area in the energy space, naming Valero Energy (VLO), HF Sinclair (DINO), and Marathon Petroleum (MARA) as its top oil stock plays. Moreover, it has buy ratings on all three of those stocks, slapping price targets of $237 on Valero, $61 on HF Sinclair, ...

headline: The economy has a Strait of Hormuz deadline for Trump: Two weeks
summary: Corporate executives are not panicking over a short-term increase in oil prices and Strait of Hormuz closure, but patience may wear thin in a matter of weeks.

headline: The Banner Year for International Stocks Has Stalled Before It Even Began
summary: This was supposed to be the year for international stocks.  Now, the Iran war has U.S. markets on top once again.  Major international benchmarks have tumbled since the start of fighting, while U.S. indexes have suffered milder losses.

raw.headline: The Banner Year for International Stocks Has Stalled Before It Even Began
